arts.ttl: Chelsea increase efforts to move into pole position for £40m Liverpool, Arsenal & Man Utd transfer target
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly stepping up their interest in the potential £40million transfer of Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap. The Blues have long been linked with Delap, who has impressed in the Premier League this season, with ten goals and two assists to his name so far. arts.ttl: Newcastle United must overcome 'horrible' Liverpool rallying cry as Virgil van Dijk gets tough
arts.sum: Newcastle United will have to combat an enthused Anfield home crowd when they visit Merseyside on Wednesday evening, with Liverpool club captain Virgil van Dijk urging supporters to make the stadium atmosphere 'horrible' for their opposition. Should Van Dijk's rallying cry to the home support be put into action, it promises to be an even trickier evening for Eddie Howe's men.

arts.ttl: “I have doubts” – Pundit speaks about Liverpool interest in midfielder, feels he can’t star in England
arts.sum: Liverpool have been linked with a move for Inter Milan’s Nicolo Barella repeatedly in recent years. The Italian has impressed for the champions this season, playing 33 times in all competitions, scoring three times and assisting six times. arts.ttl: Six players could miss Newcastle United's clash against Liverpool as Eddie Howe faces nervous wait
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Liverpool will both have players on the sidelines when they meet in the Premier League this week. Howe will be without at least one player due to injury for Newcastle's trip to Merseyside with Jamaal Lascelles still unavailable.
